title: Fix optimizer score pull name-resolution for procedures

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Patched MCP score-pull name resolution in MCP/tools/score/scores.py to use the shared direct resolver path instead of the ad hoc local helper. Local validation: direct plexus_score_pull invocation now succeeds for scorecard name SelectQuote HCS Medium-Risk and score Medication Review: Prescriber with version 27816b39-0bb8-4fd8-adec-934d40cb47ab.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Resuming break/fix: canonical optimizer runs still fail with SCORE_NOT_FOUND on named Medication Review scores. Investigating score-pull identifier resolution in optimizer path and will patch root cause, then re-run one canonical procedure to verify start.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented root-cause patch set: optimizer now uses resolved score_id for all score pull/editor setup/score test calls (instead of name-based params.score), and MCP score lookup now normalizes whitespace/case across id/name/key/externalId and returns richer diagnostics on misses. Added unit test for name-case/whitespace variant matching in score pull path. Local runtime verification pending due missing project CLI runtime in this shell.
